title: Scroll, Bento, Glare, Magnet & Type
description: Five live UI demos: CSS scroll-triggered reveals, @property bento grid, variable font wave, magnetic buttons, and glare hover cards.

drops.title: Scroll-Triggered Reveals
drops.description: Cards fade in via animation-timeline: view() — zero JS, pure CSS scroll-driven animations.
drops.concept: The CSS Scroll-Driven Animations spec allows animation-timeline: view() to link an animation to an element's scroll-intersection progress. Chrome 115+ supports this natively, and Chrome 145 adds discrete scroll-triggered animations that fire once. A scroll-progress bar uses animation-timeline: scroll() on the same page.
drops.source: Chrome for Developers / MDN Scroll-Driven Animations spec

drops.title: Animated Bento Grid
drops.description: 12-column bento grid with spinning conic-gradient borders and cursor-tracked spotlight via @property.
drops.concept: Bento grids remain the dominant landing-page layout in 2026. This demo combines CSS Grid span asymmetry with @property-powered conic-gradient borders that spin on hover, plus a radial spotlight that follows the cursor via JavaScript updating --spotlight-x/y custom properties.
drops.source: magicui.design bento grid + @property gradient borders pattern

interaction.mouse: hover cards to activate spinning border and spotlight

drops.title: Variable Font Wave
drops.description: Per-character wght axis animated by cursor proximity — hover and watch weight ripple across each letter.
drops.concept: Variable fonts expose axes like wght, wdth, and ital that can be animated via font-variation-settings. By splitting text into individual character spans and computing the distance from the cursor to each character's center, the weight axis can be driven as a spatial wave. Includes auto-wave mode with staggered animation-delay.
drops.source: css-irl.info Variable Font Animation with CSS and Splitting JS

interaction.mouse: hover/move over text to ripple weight

drops.title: Magnetic Buttons
drops.description: Buttons that attract the cursor using linear interpolation of translate — vanilla JS, no libraries.
drops.concept: Magnetic buttons compute the vector from the cursor to the button center and apply a fraction of it as a CSS translate transform, lerped each frame for smooth spring-like movement. The effect is amplified by a custom glow layer and a custom cursor that enlarges on hover. Also features 3D tilt cards with an inner spotlight.
drops.source: inithtml.com Magnetic Hover Effect: Creating Cursor-Attracted Buttons with Vanilla JavaScript

interaction.mouse: hover near buttons to feel magnetic pull

drops.title: Glare Hover Cards
drops.description: Holographic glare overlay driven by --gx/--gy CSS custom properties on mousemove — no canvas needed.
drops.concept: The glare effect uses a CSS radial-gradient on a ::before pseudo-element whose center position is controlled by --gx and --gy custom properties updated on every mousemove. A third custom property --ga (alpha) is lerped in/out to fade the glare on enter/leave. A streak variant uses the cursor angle to create a diagonal foil-card shine.
drops.source: magicui.design Glare Hover + Backlight component pattern

interaction.mouse: move over cards to see glare shift
